allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Name -like '*docker*' | Select-Object Name,Id | Format-Table -AutoSize")

PowerShell(try { wsl --terminate docker-desktop } catch {}; Remove-Item -LiteralPath "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\run" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Docker\\run"\) { "run still exists \(harmless - feature disabled\)" } else { "run dir cleared" }; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe"; "Docker Desktop launched")

PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -u root -- bash -lc "echo USER=\\$\(whoami\); echo; echo '--- os ---'; uname -s -m; cat /etc/os-release | head -2; echo; echo '--- net+tools ---'; curl --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo 'no curl'; echo; getent hosts install.aztec.network && echo 'DNS OK' || echo 'DNS FAIL'")

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "curl -fsSL https://install.aztec.network -o /tmp/ai.sh && echo '--- running installer ---' && NON_INTERACTIVE=1 bash /tmp/ai.sh 2>&1 && echo '--- INSTALLER_DONE ---'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -c "ls -ld /mnt/c/Users/USER/Documents/GitHub/trudao/dapp/node_modules 2>&1 | tr -d '\\r'; echo '--- vite tail ---'; tail -4 /tmp/vite.log 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\\r'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "echo OK; ls -ld /mnt/c/Users/USER/Documents/GitHub/trudao/dapp/node_modules 2>&1; ls /root/azns_dapp_node_modules 2>/dev/null | wc -l")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'echo WSL_OK; echo '\\''native pkgs:'\\''; ls $HOME/azns_dapp/node_modules 2>/dev/null | wc -l; free -h | head -2')

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'echo '\\''--- vite.log ---'\\''; cat /tmp/vite.log 2>&1 | tr -d '\\''\\r'\\''; echo '\\''--- vite bin present? ---'\\''; ls -l $HOME/azns_dapp/node_modules/.bin/vite 2>&1 | tr -d '\\''\\r'\\''')
